title: Easy Phantom Membrane
description: This mod adds an easy recipe for the Phantom Membrane.
body:
> This mod adds an easier way to craft the Phantom Membrane.
> 
> There's no need to wait for any phantoms or wait for night!
> 
> All you need is a feather, a piece of string and an iron ingot, a pretty rememberable recipe.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a18b5e81e5893344a5191fa56061abec09b943b5.png)

![WorksonNeoForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8782a05f027c34a54034937ccc59b44c1892ffd.png)
![WorksonFabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0716c57efc41376f145eac0b8cad8946b862aad3.png)
